steps.t: The Lossoth chieftain Yrjänä can be found in the Great Lodge of Sûri-kylä. You should ask Yrjänä if the Lossoth would be willing to trade for the key …
Yrjänä has asked you to promise to find a way to destroy the Oath-stone in exchange for the key of Agoroth. If you accept these terms, let Yrjänä know…
You have agreed to destroy the Oath-stone in exchange for the key of Agoroth. You should talk to Yrjänä in Sûri-kylä.
Salavahti can be found on the rise above Sûri-kylä. You should talk to Salavahti.
Salavahti has informed you that Lothrandir has returned to Sûri-kylä to meet you. You should talk to Lothrandir.
Arvedui has shown you and Lothrandir the hidden entrance to Agoroth in Jä-reitti. You should talk to Lothrandir.
